title: Design enterprise RAG (Glean-style) + DSA review
focus: Multi-source ingestion; permission-aware retrieval; offline+online eval.

items.label: Design enterprise RAG over docs (Glean-style)
interviewQuestions: Walk me through designing an enterprise RAG over Confluence + Slack + Drive.
How do you handle access control / permissions in retrieval?
How would you handle 50M docs and 10k QPS?

items.label: Eval & monitoring for enterprise RAG
interviewQuestions: How would you build an offline + online eval pipeline for an enterprise RAG?
What synthetic golden set would you generate for a domain where humans can't easily score answers?

items.label: Mixed enterprise docs: SharePoint, Jira, Slack, Drive
interviewQuestions: How would you ingest SharePoint, Jira, Slack, and Drive while preserving permissions and freshness?
What metadata schema would you attach to chunks so retrieval can enforce ACLs and route by source?
How do you backfill 50M documents without breaking freshness for newly edited docs?

items.label: Implement heading-aware markdown chunk retrieval
interviewQuestions: Implement retrieve_relevant_chunks(markdown, query) that preserves H1/H2/H3 hierarchy in returned chunks.
How would you score headings plus body text so a section title can match even when the paragraph uses different wording?
What edge cases break naive markdown chunking: tables, code blocks, duplicate headings, or very long sections?

items.label: Clarify requirements, users, constraints, and business metric for: Design enterprise RAG (Glean-style)
interviewQuestions: What are the first five clarifying questions before proposing any model?
What is the business metric, what is the ML proxy metric, and where can they diverge?
What scale, latency, freshness, privacy, and reliability constraints change the architecture?

items.label: Defend data, labels, baseline, model choice, feature freshness, and serving path for: Design enterprise RAG (Glean-style)
interviewQuestions: What baseline would you launch before a complex model, and how would you know it is insufficient?
Where do labels come from, what bias do they contain, and how delayed are they?
Which features must be computed online vs offline, and what happens when the feature store is slow?

items.label: Cover monitoring, rollback, cost, security, failure modes, and launch plan for: Design enterprise RAG (Glean-style)
interviewQuestions: What online metrics, guardrails, and cohort slices decide whether this system is safe to ramp?
What is the rollback trigger, fallback experience, and incident owner if quality or latency regresses?
What are the top security, privacy, abuse, or cost risks, and what controls would you ship in v1?

tracks.label: GenAI Architect · Enterprise RAG security and eval probes

items.label: Retrieval-time ACL enforcement, metadata filters, and permission freshness
interviewQuestions: Why must ACL filtering happen before documents enter the LLM context?
How do you handle a permission change that occurs after a document was embedded?
What audit log proves a user only retrieved documents they were allowed to see?

items.label: Golden datasets, adversarial queries, source freshness, and citation accuracy
interviewQuestions: How do you construct a golden set for enterprise RAG when teams use different vocabularies?
What adversarial queries test prompt injection, missing permissions, and stale documents?
How do you measure citation correctness separately from answer usefulness?

references.label: Chip Huyen — Machine Learning Systems Design
Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer exam guide
Google ML system design mock interview — YouTube recommendations
AWS mapping to OWASP Top 10 for LLM applications
